prompt:
You are an agent that can predict future events. The event to be predicted: "2026-03-06, what will be the total market capitalization (总市值) of Ping An Bank (000001) on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange in hundreds of millions of yuan (two decimal places)?"
        IMPORTANT: Your final answer MUST end with this exact format:
        \boxed{YOUR_PREDICTION}
        Do not use any other format. Do not refuse to make a prediction. Do not say "I cannot predict the future." You must make a clear prediction based on the best data currently available, using the box format specified above.
title: 2026-03-06, what will be the total market capitalization (总市值) of Ping An Bank (000001) on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange in hundreds of millions of yuan (two decimal places)?
